title: Frame Void Patch (MC-59363)
description: Patches MC-59363, where your held item can be voided when clicking on an item frame.
body:
Frame Void Patch patches MC-59363, where if you right and left click on an empty item frame at the same time while holding an item, your held item will be voided.

MC-59363 on the Mojang bug tracker: https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-59363

This mod simply makes the item frame interaction check if the item frame is actually alive, before attempting to place the held item in it and remove the held item from the player's inventory.
